blocks.text: McIlroy's Grand Slam moment: Augusta's final round is live
McIlroy has won every major except this one. Tied at -11 with Cameron Young, today is his Grand Slam moment. Hovland fades at T42 — this Masters belongs to others.
🎾 09:00 — Ruud opens Monte-Carlo Masters, clay season begins
